programmes.show_description: Chilmark Manor House. A man calls the team in to investigate his childhood home in Chilmark. Having recently moved back in, he and his family have been terrified by strange events. S2, Ep6
Old School House. In Devon, the team investigate reports of strange figures and sensations in a historic 16th-century cottage. What will they discover during their stay? S2, Ep7
Nuneaton. The team head to the midlands to take on their toughest case yet. Escalating levels of terrifying and unexplainable phenomena makes the team suspect demonic activity. S2, Ep8
Teleshopping.
Drew and Tee head to a grade II listed mansion in Lincolnshire. The house is packed with items and Drew haggles for a superb 19th century chair and a decorated chinoiserie mirror. S15, Ep14
The boys stop at a salvage yard which Drew hails as the best in the country. They find a pair of beautifully crafted sundials and an overthrow believed to be from Belvoir Castle. S15, Ep15
Gaby Roslin helps singer and TV presenter Mica Paris find a home-away from home in Sardinia. She has a budget of £850,000 for a beautiful home with a sea-view. S1, Ep7

Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep26
Back To Basics. With his new shop opening to the public, Drew needs more stock than ever. He spots a '60s Danish sofa in Malvern and a pair of tapestries in Welshpool. S12, Ep2
The X Factor. Drew seeks standout items to lure more customers to his shop. In Derbyshire, he finds a Regency picture frame, and buys a pair of Danish rattan chairs in Harrogate. S12, Ep3
When Opportunity Knocks. Drew is always hunting undiscovered treasures. He has a rare chance to scour the wild items at Chester Zoo. And in Leicestershire, he unearths a royal relic. S12, Ep4
Antiques experts Christina Trevanion and Charles Hanson embark on the last leg of their journey. Who will triumph at the final auction in Newcastle? S19, Ep5
Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst begin their hunt for hidden gems in Lewes. Plus, Tim learns about the man who introduced curry and shampoo to Britain. S19, Ep6
Leather expert Suzie and furniture restorer Will join forces to revive a strap chair. Mechanical maestro Steve faces a tricky fix on a motorised toy warplane. S6, Ep24
Back Of The Net! Irita takes a punt on a collection of coins and vintage football shirts. Plus, a local lady needs urgent help shifting unwanted collectables. S2, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina and Nicky catch up with three searchers desperate to find their parents, including John, who was reunited with his birth mother after 50 years. S7, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programmes.show_description: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell catch up with Yasika, who searched for her Sri Lankan mother, and Paula, who explored her Native American heritage. S7, Ep2
Jugtastic! Angus visits a home with a pub in it, filled with over 160 jugs. Later, he encounters a colossal collection of Glen Millar Vinyl and V-discs! S6, Ep2
Desperately Needing Angus. Angus helps a woman fund her elderly mum's care, and he clears a home for a couple who went through a life-changing, traumatic event on holiday. S6, Ep3
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep13

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Chris and Xand van Tulleken. Twin doctors Chris and Xand van Tulleken learn about their Dutch heritage, with stories of ambition, love and a link to a shameful part of history. S19, Ep5

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Nigel Havers. Actor Nigel Havers' roots prove very different from his usual upper-class roles. He discovers a tale of illegitimacy worthy of a period drama. S10, Ep2
Tivetshall Murder House. After six years of sleepless nights, the owners of a seemingly normal property call in the team to investigate why they don't feel welcome in their own home. S2, Ep9
Gedling House Of Cricket. The team of paranormal experts have been called in to investigate a 19th century town house with a celebrated but unsettling past. S2, Ep10
Ghost Of Grandad. The team are called in to investigate a house in Nottingham. The owners believe the house is haunted by multiple spirits, both malevolent and protective. S2, Ep11

Taking Risks. Drew's business has expanded so he needs twice as many items! He visits a quirky house in Suffolk, to discover a barn full of salvage from around the globe. S12, Ep5
Moving With The Times. When other businesses move with the times, Drew sees a chance to buy their unwanted stuff. In Essex, he finds a rare 1930s desk from a closing department store. S12, Ep6
